name: Aeblekage (Apple Cake)
recipeIngredient: 250 g butter or margarine (milk can be used as a substitute, for a lower fat cake, and it works just fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the wet ingredients: eggs, butter/margarine, and milk.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon (if using).
3. Combine the wet and dry ingredients until just mixed.
4. Peel and slice the apples.
5. Place the apple slices at the bottom of a greased or lined pan.
6. Pour the batter over the apples.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
9. Test the cake with a toothpick; it should come out clean when ready.
